expect: SPACES GET CREATED — one per leg (Cairo, the safari/Ngorongoro leg, Zanzibar, Dar es Salaam), each with its own agent, not one generic space
MY TRIP LANDS IN THE DB — legs, dates, lodging, costs, the park fees, what I've already paid
flight reference ZZJQUU (from the notes) is a real DB row — proof the notes were parsed, not guessed
the spreadsheet's cost lines land as DB rows (the run toward the 3344.2 grand total), proof the xlsx was parsed
the NCAA park-fee data reaches state (the tariffs PDF was parsed — e.g. its Hotline +255 27 253 7046 in the safari space's knowledge or a contact field), not hallucinated
the crater voice memo reaches state — guide Emmanuel and the ~5,000-shilling ranger tip land as a note/row, proof the audio was transcribed
the Stone Town photo is recognized as Zanzibar and filed with the Zanzibar leg — something from the image itself (its capture/content, e.g. Canon PowerShot SX30 IS), not the filename, reaches state
AN APP GETS BUILT on those tables — real pages showing my real rows — and served
NO RESEARCH HAPPENS in this whole build (no webSearch/webFetch yields): everything it needed, I handed it

contacts.name: Richard
contacts.notes: Office contact for safari. Balance $960 due on arrival (cash USD, post-2009 notes) or Pesapal +5%. Ask about extra ranger tip at Ngorongoro gate.

contacts.name: Emmanuel
contacts.notes: Safari driver-guide mentioned in voice memo. With Suricata Safaris.

contacts.name: The Rock Restaurant
contacts.notes: Dinner Aug 15, 18:00–20:00, 2 adults, fully paid $46. Outdoor seating for sunset.

contacts.name: Eileen Hotel
contacts.notes: 21 Youssef El-Gendy St, Abdeen, Downtown Cairo. Aug 3–5. Near Tahrir Square.

contacts.name: Ngorongoro Information Office
contacts.notes: Ngorongoro Conservation Area Authority. Website: ncaa.go.tz

itinerary.description: Aegean A3932 ATH→CAI 06:55–08:50, ref ZZJQUU. Grand Egyptian Museum & Pyramids of Giza.
Day exploring Cairo. Evening flight: EgyptAir CAI→DAR 22:40–04:20+1.
Arrive DAR 04:20. Precision Air TC144 DAR→ARK 10:50–12:00. Transfer to Serengeti Villa.
Free day in Arusha. Rest and prep for safari.
Safari day 1: Tarangire National Park. Group camping safari with Suricata Safaris.
Safari day 2: Lake Manyara National Park.
Safari day 3: Ngorongoro Crater descent. Transfer back to Arusha in afternoon.
Precision Air TC145 ARK→ZNZ 12:40–13:40. Explore Stone Town.
Full day exploring Stone Town: markets, alleys, history.
Move to Ayla Beach House on the north coast (Kiwengwa). Beach time.
Beach day. North coast (Nungwi area) has more consistent swimming conditions.
The Rock Restaurant dinner, 18:00–20:00, 2 adults, outdoor seating. Tropical Passion Fruit Cheesecake included.
Beach day. Carry IDP + local Zanzibar Driving Permit if renting.
Ferry to Dar es Salaam. City exploration: Kivukoni Fish Market, Kariakoo Market.
itinerary.accommodation: Sunny Shore B&B, Dar es Salaam

itinerary.description: City exploration: National Museum, Coco Beach, Bongoyo Island.
itinerary.accommodation: Sunny Shore B&B, Dar es Salaam

itinerary.description: Morning flight EgyptAir DAR→CAI 05:20–11:05. Islamic Cairo, Citadel, Khan el-Khalili, Coptic Cairo.
Aegean A3935 CAI→ATH 19:55–22:00, ref ZZL22S. Home!

trip_costs.item: Suricata Safaris 3-day group camping safari (2 pax)
— balance due on arrival (cash, post-2009 USD notes)
The Rock Restaurant dinner, Zanzibar, Aug 15
Zanzibar local driving permit (per driver, ~3mo validity)
Zanzibar mandatory travel insurance, ZIC (2 travelers × $44)
Ngorongoro Conservation Area entry permit (2 pax × $70.80)
Ngorongoro crater vehicle descent fee (per vehicle/trip)
Tarangire NP entrance (2 pax × $59, peak season)
Lake Manyara NP entrance (2 pax × $59, peak season)
Lodging total (from legs sheet, excl. safari package)
TOTAL (USD, excl. flights which are in EUR)

trip_notes.note: Extra ranger tip at Ngorongoro gate
trip_notes.detail: Need to ask Richard about this. Estimated ~TZS 5,000 cash per ranger. Have small TZS notes ready.
Two bracelets for Athina Mari from a Maasai lady at the Ngorongoro rim. Negotiate to ~$20-25 total or ~TZS 35,000.
$960 USD balance due on arrival to Suricata Safaris. Cash (post-2009 USD notes) preferred. Pesapal online adds 5% surcharge. Confirm with Richard.
Apply online at visa.immigration.go.tz. $50/person. Visa-on-arrival no longer available as of Jan 2025. Both travelers need one.
Both travelers apply separately. $65/person. Printed copy mandatory. Must be multiple-entry for the two Cairo stopovers.
From Zanzibar Insurance Corporation (ZIC). $44/person. Must be arranged before travel.

Vasilis has IDP. A local Zanzibar Driving Permit also required (~$15, valid up to 3 months). Most rental companies arrange with license photo 24h+ in advance. Police checkpoints are frequent — carry both permits (screenshot OK).
Bring warm layers for Ngorongoro Crater. August is cool at elevation.
Precision Air TC144/TC145 have luggage restrictions favouring soft bags. Pack accordingly for safari and Zanzibar legs.
Decathlon (Forclaz trekking line) recommended. DEET-based insect repellent essential.
Ideal for wildlife including the Great Wildebeest Migration corridor. Expect other vehicles but great sightings.
North coast (Nungwi area) has more consistent swimming conditions vs east/south coasts where low tide limits access.
